title: Indulgent Greek Flour Revithia
description: A silky, crowd‑pleasing porridge that heals hangovers with its soothing texture and umami shio‑koji flavor, all while staying gluten‑free.
instructions: In a small bowl whisk the rice flour, shio‑koji, and sea salt together with 240ml water until smooth.
Let the mixture rest at room temperature for 30 minutes to allow the shio‑koji to infuse the flour.
In a saucepan, heat the oat milk and olive oil over medium heat until lukewarm.
Gradually pour the rested flour mixture into the warm oat milk while whisking constantly to prevent lumps.
Cook the revithia over low heat, stirring frequently, until it thickens to a glossy, porridge‑like consistency, about 10 minutes.
Stir in the dried oregano and chopped dill, allowing the flavors to meld for an additional 2 minutes.
Remove the pan from heat and let the revithia cool slightly before serving.
Serve warm in bowls, optionally topped with a drizzle of extra olive oil and a sprinkle of fresh dill.
